hero.title: Video Distribution
hero.subtitle: Amplify Your Brand with Streaming TV & Digital Video
hero.description: Generate measurable business outcomes with AI-powered video distribution across streaming TV, CTV, and digital platforms. Reach your target audience where they watch most.

features.title: Streaming TV Advertising
features.description: Reach viewers across 500+ premium streaming channels including major networks, sports leagues, and entertainment platforms with precision-targeted video campaigns.

features.title: Audience Targeting
features.description: No wasted impressions. Target viewers by demographics, interests, location, device, and behavior to ensure your message reaches those who matter most for your brand.

features.title: AI Optimization
features.description: Leverage AI-powered campaign optimization to maximize ROAS, automatically adjust bidding, and improve performance across all your video campaigns in real-time.

features.title: Creative Solutions
features.description: Create TV-ready, customizable video ads with AI-powered tools. Transform your brand assets into professional streaming-quality content in minutes.

features.title: Cross-Platform Distribution
features.description: Distribute your video content across CTV, mobile, desktop, and tablet devices to maximize reach and engagement across every screen your audience uses.

features.title: Measurement & Reporting
features.description: Track performance across every screen with clear metrics and attribution. Make smarter decisions with real-time analytics and comprehensive reporting dashboards.

benefits.title: Generate Leads
benefits.description: Turn viewers into qualified buyers with compelling video content that drives action and measurable conversions.

benefits.title: Increase Sales
benefits.description: Generate measurable sales lift with targeted video campaigns that reach high-intent audiences at scale.

benefits.title: Build Awareness
benefits.description: Stay top of mind with premium video placements that build brand recognition and trust with your target market.

benefits.title: Attract Traffic
benefits.description: Drive convertible traffic to your website or app with engaging video content optimized for performance.
